summary: Tested Customer Portal Pending Items feature. All 6 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The feature correctly displays previously unavailable items from past orders in the Cart tab, allows adding them to cart with 'Add to Cart' button, and shows 'In Cart' status after adding.

test_credentials.Customer: Phone: 9688283839, Password: test123 (DR.DHIVAHAR with 2 pending items)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: DR.DHIVAHAR (phone: 9688283839) has 2 pending items (Vitamin D3 1000IU qty 250, Paracetamol 500mg qty 10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Portal Pending Items feature fully tested and working. Key components verified: 1) Backend: GET /api/customer/pending-items returns pending items for logged-in customer using JWT auth. 2) Frontend (CustomerOrders.jsx): pendingItems state, fetchPendingItems on mount, addPendingToCart function. 3) UI shows 'Previously Unavailable Items (N)' section with amber styling in Cart tab. 4) Section appears both when cart is empty (data-testid='pending-items-empty-cart') and when cart has items (data-testid='pending-items-section'). 5) '+Add to Cart' button adds item to cart and changes to 'In Cart' (disabled). 6) Cart tab count updates after adding pending item. 7) Toast notification shows 'Added {item_name} to cart'. 8) localStorage key for customer data is 'customerData' (not 'customer').

Backend API Tests.POST /api/customer/login: PASS - Returns access_token and customer data
Backend API Tests.GET /api/customer/pending-items - With v: PASS - Returns 2 pending items for DR.DHIVAHAR

Customer Portal UI Tests.Vitamin D3 1000IU displayed: PASS - Shows ITM-0002 | Prev Qty: 250 with Add to Cart button
Customer Portal UI Tests.Paracetamol 500mg displayed: PASS - Shows ITM-0001 | Prev Qty: 10 with Add to Cart button
Customer Portal UI Tests.Click Add to Cart: PASS - Item added to cart, toast notification shown
Customer Portal UI Tests.Button changes to In Cart: PASS - Button disabled and shows 'In Cart'
Customer Portal UI Tests.Cart count updates: PASS - Cart tab shows 'Cart (1)' after adding item
Customer Portal UI Tests.Pending items section with cart items: PASS - Section appears below cart items, before Order Notes
